name: Catalog Homepage
notes: Single OnGet handler only — no POST on this page; basket add-item POSTs go to /Basket/Index via the _product.cshtml partial.
Brand and type filter dropdowns are populated from the database on every page load (no caching); both prepend an 'All' sentinel with null value.
Pagination state (pageId) and filter state (BrandFilterApplied, TypesFilterApplied) are carried as GET query parameters — no session or cookie state.
Product image URLs are composed at render time by IUriComposer from the raw PictureUri path stored in the Catalog table.
